summary: Tested E-Commerce Integration features. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend tests confirm E-Commerce Admin Page, Public Storefront, and Items Page carousel removal working correctly.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning only

features_tested.feature: E-Commerce Admin Page - Dashboard shows stats
features_tested.details: Dashboard tab shows Monthly Revenue, Monthly Orders, Avg Order Value, Pending Orders stat cards with correct styling

features_tested.feature: E-Commerce Admin Page - Settings modal to enable/disable store
features_tested.details: Settings button opens modal with Enable Store switch, Theme Color, Store Description, Delivery Charge, Free Delivery Above, Min Order Amount, COD toggle. Save Settings button functional.

features_tested.feature: E-Commerce Admin Page - Orders list with status filters
features_tested.details: Orders tab shows order list with status filters (All, Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, etc.) and order details
Storefront loads at /store/superadmin with store name, search, filters, cart button, and footer

features_tested.feature: Public Storefront - shows products with filters
features_tested.details: Category filter, Sort By dropdown (Newest First), Price Range inputs with Apply button all functional. Shows 'No products found' when no items marked for e-commerce.
Cart button opens dialog showing 'Your Cart (0 items)' and 'Your cart is empty' message
Checkout form fields (name, email, phone, address, payment method) exist in StorefrontPage.js with data-testid attributes
Returns tenant_id, store_name, theme_color, accepts_cod, delivery_charge, free_delivery_above
Returns products array with total count, supports sort_by, category_id, min_price, max_price filters
Validates cart items, returns subtotal, delivery_charge, tax_amount, total, errors array, is_valid flag
GET returns current settings, PUT updates and persists settings correctly
Returns orders array with stats (total_orders, pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered)
Returns monthly_revenue, monthly_orders, avg_order_value, pending_orders, recent_orders, top_products
No carousel/setInterval/3000/autoplay/slide code found in ItemsPage.js. Product cards show single static image.

critical_code_review_comments: E-commerce settings stored in ecommerce_settings collection with tenant_id
Cart validation correctly checks stock availability and calculates delivery/tax
Stripe integration configured but using test key (sk_test_emergent)
Public storefront accessible without authentication as expected
seed_data_creation: E-commerce settings enabled for tenant 'superadmin'. Existing test orders (SO-2602-0001, SO-2602-0002) visible in orders list. 3 items exist but show 'Out of Stock' and don't appear in storefront due to stock_quantity=0 requirement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-Commerce features fully implemented. Admin page at nav-ecommerce with Dashboard and Orders tabs. Public storefront at /store/{tenant_slug}. Settings modal accessible via data-testid='ecommerce-settings-btn'. Storefront shows 'No products found' because items need stock_quantity > 0 to appear - this is expected behavior. Items page has no carousel, product images are static.
